## ExtensionDefinition interface

A complete extension definition bundling types, constraints, annotations, and vocabulary keywords.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface ExtensionDefinition 
```

## Example


```typescript
const monetaryExtension = defineExtension({
  extensionId: "x-stripe/monetary",
  types: [
    defineCustomType({
      typeName: "Decimal",
      toJsonSchema: (_payload, prefix) => ({
        type: "string",
        [`${prefix}-decimal`]: true,
      }),
    }),
  ],
});
```
